title: Carlube QPI300 Petrol Fuel System Treatment & Injector Cleaner 300ml x 2
features: Carlube Petrol Injector Cleaner has been specially formulated to ensure maximum fuel system efficiency in all petrol engines including injection and carburettor systems.
With untreated fuel, dirt and deposits can build up in carburettors, injectors, inlet ports and valves which reduce engine performance and lead to increased fuel consumption and exhaust emissions.
Works by restoring injector spray patterns and cleaning carburettor jets.
Cleans and protects the entire fuel suystem
Suitable for use with turbochargers and catalytic converters
description: Carlube Petrol Injector Cleaner has been specially formulated to ensure maximum fuel system efficiency in all petrol engines including injection and carburettor systems. With untreated fuel, dirt and deposits can build up in carburettors, injectors, inlet ports and valves which reduce engine performance and lead to increased fuel consumption and exhaust emissions. Works by restoring injector spray patterns and cleaning carburettor jets. ADVANTAGES Cleans and protects the entire fuel suystem Reduces inlet valve and injector/carburettor deposits Helps to eliminate stalling and hesitation Benefits fuel economy and smoke emissions Prolongs the life of the fuel system Suitable for use with turbochargers and catalytic converters APPLICATION Add entire contents of the bottle to a full tank of Petrol. Treats up to 50 litres. For best results, use every 3000 miles or once every six months
